programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action.

programme.title: Fight Sports WCK
programme.desc: From explosive knockouts and technical battles to the electrifying atmosphere that has made Muay Thai one of the fastest-growing combat sports in the world, every bout delivers the excitement of world-class kickboxing.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Major League Fishing All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 1 with angler commentary.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5

programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Major League Fishing All Angles
programme.desc: All Angles inside look at the MLF Team Series 2025 Challenge Cup Knockout Match 1 with angler commentary.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The San Diego Padres host the Toronto Blue Jays at Petco Park in Game 3 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman is the starting pitcher for the Blue Jays, while German Marquez takes the mound for the Padres in an interleague regular-season showdown.

programme.title: The Blue Jays Way
programme.desc: A young expansion team grows from snowy underdogs to contenders as Dave Stieb defines the Blue Jays origin story.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: The Blue Jays Way
programme.desc: A young expansion team grows from snowy underdogs to contenders as Dave Stieb defines the Blue Jays origin story.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Home Run Derby
programme.desc: The best sluggers in baseball put their power to the test and chase home run glory. From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.title: TBL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with team's fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: OVW Wrestling
programme.desc: Wrestling action from the circuit that trained legends like John Cena, Brock Lesnar, and CM Punk.

programme.title: Gotham Wrestling
programme.desc: Coverage of the independent wrestling promotion based in New York.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance features top-ranked fighters, up-and-coming fighters, intense action and footage from some of the biggest names in combat sports and exclusive content spanning MMA, boxing, kickboxing, bare knuckle boxing, Muay Thai and more.

programme.title: Big League Wiffle Ball
programme.desc: Coverage of wiffle ball action from the professional league.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!

programme.title: Pro Footvolley Tour
programme.desc: Shake the winter blues on sun-kissed Hollywood Beach with the exciting hybrid of soccer and volleyball.

programme.desc: Parkour and Ninja Warrior athletes compete against each other in high-level action matches of tag during international tournaments.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Live: NWSL
programme.desc: Seattle Reign v Portland Thorns (Kick-off 9.00pm). Coverage of the match from Lumen Field in Seattle.

programme.title: Classic Premier League
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the 2005/06 season. Thierry Henry became the first player in the league's history to win the Golden Boot four times, top-scoring with 27 goals.

programme.title: Classic Premier League
programme.desc: A look back at the best goals from the 2006/07 season. Chelsea's Didier Drogba topped the scoring charts with 20 goals, ahead of Benni McCarthy (18) and Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.desc: Action from Rally Estonia.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best batting action from West Indies v Sri Lanka in the second Test of the series.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at the best bowling action from West Indies v Sri Lanka in the second Test of the series.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.title: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Action from the first ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Coverage of the second ODI in the five-match series from Providence Cricket Stadium in Guyana. The visitors have won the last three series in this format against the West Indies and have also won eight of their last nine ODI's against them. They last met in a three-game series in New Zealand in November last year, with the Kiwi's winning all three matches.

programme.title: Live: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: Seattle Reign FC hosts Portland Thorns FC in a regular-season NWSL soccer game at Lumen Field. The visiting Thorns rely on forward Sophia Smith to lead the attack, while the home Reign count on forward Mia Fishel to drive the offense.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: From American Airlines Center in Dallas.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: A look back at Barcelona's memorable victory against Manchester United in 2011. Plus, highlights of the 2004 final between FC Porto and Monaco.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: We take a look back at Ajax's UEFA Champions League final against AC Milan's famous team in 1995 and Bayern Munich's dramatic victory over Valencia in the 2001 final.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Relive Arsenal's 2006 final with Barcelona and take a look back at the 1998 showpiece between Marcello Lippi's Juventus and Real Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: Take a look back at the 2009 final between Barcelona and Manchester United. Plus, relive the first ever all-Spanish final in European Cup history between Real Madrid and Valencia.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: San Diego Padres v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 9.10pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from Petco Park, as the teams play the third and final game of the series. The two sides last met in a three-match series in Toronto back in May last year, as the Blue Jays claimed a 3-0 victory. Toronto dominated the first two games thanks to 3-0 and 14-0 wins before they won a tight affair 7-6 to sweep t

programme.desc: MLB Classic takes a look at one of the epic moments from the game's history and the 1993 National League West.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Ayr.

programme.title: Irish Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Killarney.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: Angus McNae returns to crunch the numbers on the new flat season.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Ayr.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team is back in the Yukon getting camp set up. Included is the challenging task of transporting the ARGO UTVs from one place to another.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: There's buried treasure along the Washington coastline and fishmonger Tommy Gomes is on the hunt.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane searches his tackle box to select the appropriate bait for bass fishing.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: A Colorado Elk hunt from a fresh perspective as Kyle Wieter helps guide his close friend and first time hunter Brad Pfitzner to success.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Part 2 of a nighttime patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Cobb and the infamous hartebeest.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve takes Evan Felker, lead singer of Turnpike Troubadours, on his first Alaskan black bear hunt.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers give an inside look at how "Dropped" came to be.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds, and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Batten Down October.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Cobb and the infamous hartebeest.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse in

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim's Top Guide - 2025 Yukon Recap - Part 2.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: New Zealand is a hunters paradise and the boys from Savage Outdoors are there to find everything it has to offer.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: RNT-V is based around the RNT Call Shop in Stuttgart, Arkansas--from chasing ducks and geese over fine retrievers in different parts of the country to uncovering the history of an old time call maker. Hosted by World Champions who are all about the hunt!

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television, America's original and longest-running waterfowl series, brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DUTV is co-produced by MOOSE Media; the series' current stable of on-air personalities includes Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Colin Mulligan, Betsy Newbill, Dr. Karen Waldrop, Mike Stewart and Phil Bourjaily. With support from

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Part 2 of a nighttime patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry heads to Mexico to kick off the wingshooting season with Steve McCain of Wide Open Outfitters.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Hardcore Pursuit
programme.desc: Follow Mike Pelletier and the hearty gang of northern hunters as they chase whitetail deer, mule deer, elk, moose, bear, turkey and whatever else proves to be an exciting challenge all across North America during Season 18 of HARDCORE Pursuit.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: The guys head to Hatfield McCoy for a little business retreat while also riding Big Coal River and Braveheart trail systems.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In a classic western, Clint Eastwood -- aka Blondie -- saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from; recreating each scene and testing the reality of those shots.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Heading to Iowa in springtime to chase turkeys with Wyatt and Jay.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on the water, fishing off the coast of South Carolina for the number one seafood in America.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: This week, Bill is battling big snook near Port Canaveral, Florida!

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Close range bow hunting in Old Mexico.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price travels to British Columbia and flies into the backcountry to hunt for big moose and mountain goats.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetail

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves, and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Three Purple Heart heroes join Mike and the Big Deer crew in Virginia. Part 2.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Curt Wells and 9/11 survivor Will Jimeno chase elk in the Colorado mountains, where close encounters and missed chances turn the focus to the experience and meaning of the hunt.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts for squirrels and rabbits with Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jason Phelps hunt for mule deer in Idaho.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the Caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.title: Mets Yearbook
programme.desc: Highlights of the New York Mets season.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Oh Yeah... is a gold mine of obscure, oddball, and twisted stories spanning 40 years in New York Sports and nothing is off limits. With interviews involving celebrity and sports personalities, SNY takes a look back.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure, oddball, and twisted stories from 1976.

programme.title: Collegiate Summer Baseball
programme.desc: From Arnie Allen Diamond at Guv Fuller Field in Falmouth, Mass.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Ideal Prostate+ Provides Safe Natural Relief
programme.desc: Ideal Prostate is the only Prostate Formula with a patented blend to relieve both PROSTATE & BLADDER Symptoms. Tune in for a Special TV offer!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mets Fast Forward
programme.desc: From July 12, 2026.

programme.title: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Live: The Carton Show with Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle
programme.desc: Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle take on major sports storylines featuring heated debates and strong, often controversial, opinions.

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1980.

programme.title: Broadway Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live Major League Cricket
programme.desc: The Texas Super Kings face Los Angeles Knight Riders in a Major League Cricket clash.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Live Women's Test Day 4: ENG v IND
programme.desc: Day four of England's historic standalone women's Test match against India at the home of cricket, Lord's.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: NRL Women's Premiership
programme.desc: Coverage of matches played in the Australian Women's National Rugby League.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 11, 2001.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: Another vintage batch of footage from the FA Cup.

programme.desc: From Accor Stadium in Sydney.

programme.title: Sportsnet World Highlights
programme.desc: A look at the best stories from around the world of sports.

programme.title: Rugby Super League

programme.title: By the Books
programme.desc: Host Dave Ross, with the latest betting information to get you set for your day.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.desc: From May 12, 2001.

programme.title: MotoGP Racing
programme.desc: From Sachsenring in Hohenstein-Ernstthal, Sachsen, Germany.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: It's not every day that we get to fish below Victoria Falls, one of the great natural wonders of our world. Nor is it that you get to do so in the company of a former Springbok Captain and Rugby legend. Not that it took much convincing to entice Bob.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The warm currents of the Indian Ocean provide a bounty of species for anglers to target. Join Tommo and Wes as they cruise around the islands off Vilanculos hunting for the resident fish for which these reefs are renowned.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: South Africa's largest port city, Durban, forms a perfect melting pot of deep calm waters and warm currents, which in turn brings in the big game fish; it's time to see what Durban has to offer!

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Tommo fishes the lower Zambezi River, staying on a live aboard boat and fishing with Cuan Meredith, the owner of River Gods Adventures. They fish with baits, targeting a variety of species of fish, some of which are endemic to the lower Zambezi.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: We paddle down the largest waterway in South Africa, the great Orange river. Carving a path through Namibia, we endure the Kalahari Desert to challenge the yellow fish that grows to trophy proportions in this wild environment.

programme.title: Fifty Places to Fly Fish Before You Die
programme.desc: Conway Bowman heads to the big sky country of Montana while salmon flies are hatching.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Bad weather forces Dr Bob to swap his plane for a jet boat as he takes a Rose Bowl winner & friends salmon fishing.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Four Missouri farm boys run into bug trouble as they fish for silver salmon.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: It's not every day that we get to fish below Victoria Falls, one of the great natural wonders of our world. Nor is it that you get to do so in the company of a former Springbok Captain and Rugby legend. Not that it took much convincing to entice Bob.

programme.desc: An old medical school buddy visits Dr Bob to get a taste of Alaskan fishing.

programme.desc: Bob's business suffers a setback when his plane, the Beaver, breaks down on an Alaskan Lake.

programme.desc: We paddle down the largest waterway in South Africa, the great Orange river. Carving a path through Namibia, we endure the Kalahari Desert to challenge the yellow fish that grows to trophy proportions in this wild environment.

programme.title: Fifty Places to Fly Fish Before You Die
programme.desc: Conway Bowman heads to the big sky country of Montana while salmon flies are hatching.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: An old medical school buddy visits Dr Bob to get a taste of Alaskan fishing.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Bob's business suffers a setback when his plane, the Beaver, breaks down on an Alaskan Lake.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT Kenney heads to one of the greatest fisheries in the U.S. - Headwaters Lake.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: 2025 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 from Smith Mountain Lake in Franklin County, VA. Anglers compete to advance as well as $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 12 Utes (8-2, 5-2 Big 12) face the Wildcats (5-5, 4-3) for the first time. Utah looks to solidify its CFP case after topping 40 points in winning five of its last six. Kansas State tries to clinch its 14th bowl game since the 2010 campaign.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by California Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 California Golden Bears.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 13 Utes try to keep their faint Big 12 title aspirations alive as they visit the Jayhawks. The programs last met in 1996. Utah needs a victory, plus wins by BYU, Arizona State and West Virginia, to reach the conference championship game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 15 Utes battle with the Cornhuskers in the Las Vegas Bowl from Allegiant Stadium. Utah makes a record seventh appearance at this event, going 4-2 in those previous games but losing its last showing in 2023. Utah has won five straight in 2023.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 18 Sooners host the No. 15 Wolverines. Oklahoma won the only meeting, 14-6 in the Orange Bowl on Jan. 1, 1976. Justice Haynes (MICH) rushed for career highs of 159 yards and three touchdowns in a 34-17 season-opening victory over New Mexico.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 13 Sooners (2-0) complete a home-and-home series with the Owls (2-0) in Week 3. The Sooners won 51-3 in 2024. Oklahoma comes off a 24-13 triumph over then-No. 15 Michigan. Temple totaled 97 points in victories over UMass and Howard.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmaker Billy Corben documents the rise to prominence of the college football program at the University of Miami.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The University of Miami's football program tries to recover from the devastation left by NCAA sanctions and scandals.
